title: PlanEntry
description: A single line item within a pricing plan: a quota, metered charge, included feature, or add-on. Entries are the units that compose a plan in the API Commons Plans model.

label.description: Human-readable label for the entry as it appears in pricing copy.

description.description: Description of what the entry meters or includes.
description.example: Monthly API request quota across all included endpoints.

type.description: How the entry is billed or counted.

metric.description: Unit of measurement for this entry.

limit.description: Numeric cap on this entry within the time frame. Use -1 for unlimited; strings allowed for ranges or 'unlimited'.

timeFrame.description: Time window over which the limit or metric resets.

geo.description: Geographic scope of the entry, if pricing varies by region.

domains.description: API domains or surfaces this entry applies to.

unit.description: Unit size for billing — e.g. priced per 1, per 1000, per GB.

price.description: Price expressed as a string to accommodate percentages, formulas, ranges, and 'Contact Us' values.

userMultiplied.description: Whether the limit or price scales per seat or per user.

feature_flag.description: Identifier used by entitlement platforms (Schematic, Stigg) to gate this entry in product code.
